front.text: <family "ArnoPro-Bold"><for> <family "ArnoPro-Regular">When the mythos phase ends: Perform a <family "ArnoPro-Bold">Sacrifice.
front.flavor_text: <family "ArnoPro-Italic"><Size 8.5>The strange priest who has abducted Miyu is performing a profane ritual to drain the girl of her essence and summon his dark master to this world. To fuel the ritual and strengthen the magical barrier protecting them, wayward souls are being called to the gallows from all corners of Onigawa, across all time and space...

back.name: Minutes to Midnight
back.text:
<family "ArnoPro-Italic">As more and more souls are sacrificed upon the cathedral's Profane Altar, the Shepherd's body begins to pulse, phasing in and out of existence as the ritual's power intensifies. A spectral silhouette, from some hellish place you cannot begin to fathom, emerges from the aether and gradually begins to take the shepherd's place...
You're running out of time. Moloch is close...
<family "ArnoPro-Regular">Shuffle the Shepherd of the Black Harvest enemy into the sacrifice deck.
Place 1 doom on Miyu Tachibana <family "ArnoPro-Italic">(Lost and Found).
<family "ArnoPro-Regular">Flip the Sundered Cathedral location to its revealed side.
Put the set aside Moloch <family "ArnoPro-Italic">(The Infernal Engine)<family "ArnoPro-Regular"> enemy into play at Profane Altar.
Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck.

front.text:
<family "ArnoPro-Bold"><for> <family "ArnoPro-Regular">When the mythos phase ends: Perform a <family "ArnoPro-Bold">Sacrifice.
<family "ArnoPro-Bold"><for> <family "ArnoPro-Regular">Do not remove doom from any other card in play when this agenda advances.
front.flavor_text: <family "ArnoPro-Italic"><Size 8.5>With every sacrifice that fuels his resurrection, Moloch's intangible essence grows closer to gaining a physical foothold into this world...

back.name: Speak of the Devil
back.text:
<family "ArnoPro-Italic">Miyu gasps: the sound of a death rattle. You can feel her slipping away, and, empowered by the senseless slaughter, Moloch's flickering shadow begins to take form...
<family "ArnoPro-Regular">Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck.
Flip the Profane Altar location to its revealed side.
Flip the Moloch <family "ArnoPro-Italic">(The Infernal Engine)<family "ArnoPro-Regular"> enemy to its reverse side.
If Miyu Tachibana <family "ArnoPro-Italic">(Lost and Found)<family "ArnoPro-Regular"> is at the Profane Altar location, move all doom on her onto Moloch <family "ArnoPro-Italic">(The Ghost of Onigawa),<family "ArnoPro-Regular"> then shuffle Miyu Tachibana into the sacrifice deck.

front.text: <family "ArnoPro-Bold"><for> <family "ArnoPro-Regular">When the mythos phase ends: Perform two <family "ArnoPro-Bold">Sacrifices.
front.flavor_text: <family "ArnoPro-Italic"><Size 8.5>Despite your amateur interventions -- or, perhaps, because of them -- Moloch walks the world once more, and he has no purpose other than to gorge himself on Onigawa's misery. Creation itself trembles; without the strength of the Guardians left to oppose him, is there any hope...?

back.name: In the End
back.text:
<family "ArnoPro-Italic">It's no use. Like the Stewards of August before you, the Lunar Queen, and even the Guardians themselves, you have only succeeded in delaying Moloch's inevitable coming. He is fear made flesh and nothing can stop him now...
Woe to the conquered.
(<res>4</res>)

front.text:
</family><Size 7><action><size 8.5> <family "ArnoPro-Regular">If there are no clues at your location: Flip the Torii Nexus location to its revealed side. <family "ArnoPro-Italic">(Group limit once per game.)
<family "ArnoPro-Bold"><obj> <family "ArnoPro-Regular">Investigators at Torii Nexus must spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.
front.flavor_text: <family "ArnoPro-Italic"><Size 8.5>The cataclysm has separated you from both your companions and from Miyu. You need to find some way to regroup...

back.name: The Stars Above
back.text:
<family "ArnoPro-Italic">You've managed to achieve passage to several of the other floating islands with help from the Torii Gate, but none seem to get you any closer to the cathedral. You turn around and prepare to return to the shelf and come up with a new plan, when you realize that the torii gates on each island have all been perfectly aligned with the rune-marked moon...
You pull out the Camera Obscura and attempt to photograph the moon through the torii gate nearest to you. When the shutter clicks, the image in the portal instantly changes to a lifeless, rocky expanse...
<family "ArnoPro-Regular">Put the set aside Harvest Moon location into play unrevealed.

front.text: <family "ArnoPro-Bold"><obj><family "ArnoPro-Regular"> If there are no clues on the Harvest Moon location, advance.
front.flavor_text: <family "ArnoPro-Italic"><Size 8.5>It's been there, all along, watching you, and it's helped -- or hampered -- your investigation every step of the way. Maybe the answers you seek are written in the stars...or maybe you've just finally lost your mind?

back.name: A Giant Leap
back.text:
<family "ArnoPro-Italic">Well, you did it: you went to the moon. And, surprisingly, nothing abjectly terrible happened to you as a result. It's surprisingly hot up here, though, and the moon is still high enough in the sky that the thin oxygen levels are starting to give you a migraine. Not for nothing, but, why are you even here...?
You manage to bounce around the moon's rocky surface until at last you reach the center of the rune carved into its surface. Inside an enormous crater, a strange object smolders like charcoal...
<family "ArnoPro-Regular">Put the set aside Smoldering Spawn <family "ArnoPro-Italic">(What Was Lost In The Fire)<family "ArnoPro-Regular"> story asset into play at the Harvest Moon location.

front.text: <family "ArnoPro-Bold"><obj> <family "ArnoPro-Regular">If there are 4 or more </family></family></family><Size 7><blessing><family "ArnoPro-Regular"><Size 8.5> tokens sealed on Smoldering Spawn, advance.
front.flavor_text: <family "ArnoPro-Italic"><Size 8.5>The bloody crescent on the moon's surface appears to be some kind of oval container nestled in the center of a large crater. It's warm to the touch... Perhaps there's some way to open it...?

back.name: Gods Among Us
back.text:
<family "ArnoPro-Italic">You watch the egg-like object siphon away the energy you've worked so hard to generate, like some sort of karmic sinkhole. You're about to abandon hope, when suddenly, it cracks, and a pillar of flame ejects from the surface of moon...
<family "ArnoPro-Regular">Release all tokens sealed on Smoldering Spawn and remove it from the game.
Shuffle all six </family><family "ArnoPro-BoldItalic">Avatar</family><family "ArnoPro-Regular"> story assets from the </family><Family "ArnoPro-Italic">Forged In Flames</family><family "ArnoPro-Regular"> encounter set together, and then check the Campaign Log and proceed to the relevant section below:
<family "ArnoPro-Bold">If <family "ArnoPro-BoldItalic">the investigators sabotaged the sacred foundry:
<family "ArnoPro-Regular">Reveal three of the gathered cards at random. The lead investigator must choose one to put into play at Harvest Moon. Remove the unchosen cards and any unrevealed cards from the game.
<family "ArnoPro-Bold">If <family "ArnoPro-BoldItalic">the investigators used the Anvil of Creation:
<family "ArnoPro-Regular">Choose one of the gathered cards at random and put it into play at Harvest Moon. Remove the rest of the cards from the game.

front.text:
</family><family "ArnoPro-Bold">Reminder --</family><family "ArnoPro-Regular"> Harmony tokens count as both a </family><size 7><blessing><size 8.5><family "ArnoPro-Regular"> and a </family><size 7><curse><size 8.5><family "ArnoPro-Regular"> token and, during skill tests the performing investigator may choose which of the two to resolve them as. Resolved harmony tokens are returned to the chaos bag after the test ends.
<family "ArnoPro-Bold"><obj> <family "ArnoPro-Regular">If there are 8 harmony tokens in the chaos bag, or Moloch is in the victory display, advance.
front.flavor_text: <family "ArnoPro-Italic"><Size 8.5>You would not believe it had you not seen it with your own two eyes. The relic upon the moon's surface was no mere anomaly; it was the sacred vessel for a Guardian's rebirth...

back.name: What Was Promised
back.text:
<family "ArnoPro-Bold"><Size 8>If Moloch <family "ArnoPro-BoldItalic">(The Ghost of Onigawa)<family "ArnoPro-Bold"> was in the victory display when this advanced:
<family "ArnoPro-Italic">Moloch howls as he reels from your relentless assault; he clearly did not expect you to be equipped to harm him. His burgundy skin turns to ash as his depraved essence begins to lose purchase on his physical form. The ground below you begins to shudder; in the confusion, you quickly grab Miyu from the altar before hurling yourself into the nearest torii gate...
(<res>2</res>)
<family "ArnoPro-Bold">If there were 8 harmony tokens in the chaos bag when this advanced:
<family "ArnoPro-Italic">Empowered by your ministrations, the reborn Guardian swoops down upon the cathedral to engage Moloch head on. Crackling bolts of magical energy arc across the landscape as they trade blows, and the impact of their duel hurls you into the portal of a nearby torii gate... 
(<res>1</res>)
